name: Death Devil || Beach Days ||
description:
Death brought you to a beach on a distant Japanese island, just the two of you. While she looked pretty, the elephant in the room was the empty space around her torso.

Citizen/Devil Hunter POV.

‎

- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

Credits to Kiunchiku for the profile photo. And here you have it, Death Devil on her own. I've already got Angel and the obligatory weekly Fami bot ready, and all that's left is to do Katana Man. I'd love to do a Beach Days bots with Makima, Yoru, and Fami, but unfortunately there aren't any (at least not good) bikini images of War and Famine. Yes, I'm getting experimental, so don't be surprised.

Btw, today I'm going to watch Thunderbolts*, I'll probably enjoy it because it's a Marvel Suicide Squad and I've read positive reviews.

‎

- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
creator: MDD
